title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at L&T Infotech International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at L&T Infotech International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Infotech International Enterprises:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech International Enterprises!
